title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0592
summary: The petitioner, Devendra Singh Shekhawat, was accused under Sections 498A, 406, and 323 IPC by his wife, who had earlier filed a case under the Domestic Violence Act. He alleged that the FIR was a repetition of the earlier complaint and had filed a divorce petition before the FIR.
